name: IoT Spec Fit Check
description: Adapt imported .trellis/spec/iot/ knowledge base to this ESP32-S3 + LVGL + NimBLE + Python-companion project: delete unrelated entries, adapt mismatched ones, add project-specific pitfalls/playbooks, refresh index.md
creator: ChenShuang

subtasks.name: Phase 1: delete 54 unrelated entries (52 planned + 2 orphans) to _archived_unrelated/
Phase 2: adapt 5 mismatched entries (FT5x06, 40-row buffer, font_manager, allocator, http-bridge)
Phase 3: write 7 project-specific entries (N16R8 QIO, sdkconfig regen, NimBLE-PSRAM, Tiny-TTF+FA fallback, 40-row DR, ESP->PC NOTIFY, BLE UUID DR)
Phase 4: refresh 6 index.md files (delete links + add new entries as 本项目专属 section)
Phase 5: regression verification (88 links, 0 broken, 0 orphans)

notes: Pivoted from the default fullstack-web bootstrap task (which wanted spec/backend + spec/frontend). Those layers don't apply to an ESP32 firmware + LVGL UI + Python-companion project. The imported spec/iot/ has ~138 entries from other projects (STM32, ASR-Pro, KVM, etc.) that need Fit Check per iot/guides/spec-reuse-safety-playbook.md. See prd.md for per-entry checklist.
